title: Tuesday Already?
excerpt: We got back from our short trip to Hawaii late last night. It was Jack's first time flying and he did fantastic. Pretty certain we have a little jetsetter on our hands but I will elaborate more on that later.…
body: We got back from our short trip to Hawaii late last night. It was Jack's first time flying and he did fantastic. Pretty certain we have a little jetsetter on our hands but I will elaborate more on that later. For now, I am still laying in bed with two space heaters on full blast wondering why we had to come back to temperatures half of what they were in Oahu. I realize most of the country is far colder than here in LA, but I feel the need to whine just a little bit because we are not properly equipped for this. Or, our house isn't at least. As I thaw out (only a minor exaggeration), and get back to our normal routine, I'll return to normal blogging tomorrow. Hope you all are warm/toasty/at least comfortable wherever you are in the world!
